title: Circle Break
description: This resource packs changes the breaking/mining animation to be a circle!
body:
This resource pack let's you have **circles as the break animation**.
This project works good for any **version from 1.20.2 up to the latest one**.

**NOTE:**
If you are using a newer version, in the Resource Packs menu it will say that the resource pack is made for a older version and may not work on the new one, which is completely fine and the resource pack will work anyway.

**Feel free to do anything with this resource pack, you can add it to your own resource pack if you want.**
